landing.title: Turn your future into a data-driven decision
landing.description: CareerForge AI analyzes your skills, academic performance, and interests to predict the best career paths, identify skill gaps, and build a personalized roadmap to your dream job.
landing.features_sub: We combine machine learning with labor market data to deliver actionable career intelligence.
landing.feature1_desc: AI-generated career path predictions with success probability scores based on your unique profile.
landing.feature2_desc: Visual comparison of your current skills vs. market requirements with actionable recommendations.
landing.feature3_desc: Step-by-step learning path with certifications and milestones tailored to your target career.
landing.feature4_desc: Simulate "What if I learn this skill?" scenarios and watch your success probability change in real-time.
landing.feature5_desc: AI-curated job recommendations ranked by match percentage based on your skills and aspirations.
auth.name: Full Name
auth.error_invalid_cr: Invalid CR number. Must be 10 digits starting with a valid Saudi prefix.
auth.error_invalid_password: Password must be at least 8 characters long and contain at least one letter and one number
auth.error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
